Solution 11

Application Infrastructure

Hyper-converged infrastructure, data protection, and enterprise storage solutions for running and protecting critical application workloads on-premises and in the cloud.

Key Vendors & Brands

Click any brand to see product details

RU
Rubrik Data Security & Backup
＋ View details
RU

Rubrik

Data Security & Backup

Rubrik is a data security company providing ransomware-resilient backup, recovery, and data observability -- ensuring business continuity when attacks occur.

Key Features

  • Immutable backups that ransomware cannot encrypt
  • Rapid recovery with SLA-driven automation
  • Sensitive data discovery in backup copies
  • Threat hunting in backup data
  • Cloud archival to AWS, Azure, GCP

Use Cases

  • ✓ Recover from ransomware in minutes with clean backup copies
  • ✓ Discover where sensitive data lives across backup snapshots
  • ✓ Meet RPO of 15 minutes and RTO of 1 hour for critical workloads
Why CrewTEC recommends Rubrik

Rubrik has become the standard for ransomware-resilient backup. CrewTEC deploys Rubrik and tests recovery runbooks to ensure our clients can actually recover when it matters.

Interested in Rubrik? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Rubrik →
NU
Nutanix Hyper-Converged Infra
＋ View details
NU

Nutanix

Hyper-Converged Infra

Nutanix HCI converges compute, storage, and networking into a simple software-defined platform -- eliminating SAN complexity while delivering enterprise-grade performance and availability.

Key Features

  • AOS storage with distributed architecture
  • AHV built-in hypervisor
  • Prism management console
  • One-click upgrades with no downtime
  • DR orchestration with Leap

Use Cases

  • ✓ Replace legacy 3-tier infrastructure with simple HCI nodes
  • ✓ Run VDI, databases, and tier-1 apps on a single platform
  • ✓ Achieve disaster recovery with 1-click failover orchestration
Why CrewTEC recommends Nutanix

Nutanix transforms data centre operations. CrewTEC is a Nutanix partner with certified architects delivering HCI deployments, migrations, and operational support across India.

Interested in Nutanix? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Nutanix →
HI
Hitachi Vantara Storage & Analytics
＋ View details
HI

Hitachi Vantara

Storage & Analytics

Hitachi Vantara provides enterprise storage, object storage, and data analytics solutions -- built for the most demanding workloads in banking, manufacturing, and government.

Key Features

  • Hitachi Virtual Storage Platform (VSP) for block storage
  • Content Intelligence for unstructured data
  • Object storage at petabyte scale
  • Storage virtualisation
  • DataOps for analytics pipelines

Use Cases

  • ✓ Store and protect mission-critical databases with six-nines availability
  • ✓ Manage petabytes of unstructured data with object storage
  • ✓ Virtualise existing heterogeneous storage for unified management
Why CrewTEC recommends Hitachi Vantara

Hitachi Vantara storage is trusted by the world's largest banks and governments. CrewTEC deploys Hitachi storage for tier-1 workloads demanding the highest reliability.

Interested in Hitachi Vantara? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Hitachi Vantara →
CO
Cohesity Data Management
＋ View details
CO

Cohesity

Data Management

Cohesity simplifies data management by consolidating backup, file services, object storage, and analytics onto a single web-scale platform.

Key Features

  • DataProtect for backup and recovery
  • SmartFiles for file and object storage
  • DataHawk for threat intelligence in data
  • Global deduplication and compression
  • SaaS backup for Microsoft 365 and Salesforce

Use Cases

  • ✓ Consolidate multiple backup products into one Cohesity cluster
  • ✓ Detect ransomware in backup data before it encrypts clean copies
  • ✓ Back up Microsoft 365 data independently of Microsoft
Why CrewTEC recommends Cohesity

Cohesity eliminates backup sprawl. CrewTEC replaces legacy Veritas and CommVault deployments with Cohesity for simpler operations and better ransomware resilience.

Interested in Cohesity? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Cohesity →
LE
Lenovo Servers & Storage
＋ View details
LE

Lenovo

Servers & Storage

Lenovo ThinkSystem servers and ThinkAgile HCI solutions provide reliable, high-performance compute and storage infrastructure for data centres of all sizes.

Key Features

  • ThinkSystem rack and tower servers
  • ThinkAgile HX (Nutanix-certified) HCI
  • ThinkAgile MX (Microsoft Azure Stack HCI)
  • XClarity management for unified server management
  • TruScale infrastructure-as-a-service

Use Cases

  • ✓ Replace aging server infrastructure with modern high-density compute
  • ✓ Deploy HCI using Lenovo ThinkAgile with Nutanix software
  • ✓ Consume infrastructure as a service with TruScale pay-per-use
Why CrewTEC recommends Lenovo

Lenovo delivers enterprise-grade servers at competitive pricing. CrewTEC is a Lenovo partner supplying and deploying ThinkSystem servers and ThinkAgile HCI across India.

Interested in Lenovo? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Lenovo →
VA
Vantageo Infrastructure Solutions
＋ View details
VA

Vantageo

Infrastructure Solutions

Vantageo provides specialised infrastructure solutions and services -- delivering purpose-built platforms for enterprise workloads with local engineering support.

Key Features

  • Custom infrastructure design and build
  • Converged infrastructure solutions
  • Infrastructure managed services
  • Migration and transformation services
  • Local support and SLA commitments

Use Cases

  • ✓ Design and build a custom infrastructure solution for unique workloads
  • ✓ Migrate workloads from legacy infrastructure with minimal downtime
  • ✓ Get managed infrastructure services with local SLA guarantees
Why CrewTEC recommends Vantageo

Vantageo's local presence complements CrewTEC's deployment capabilities. We partner with Vantageo for custom infrastructure projects requiring specialised design and build expertise.

Interested in Vantageo? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

  • ✓ Simplify data centre with hyper-converged infrastructure
  • ✓ Protect workloads with ransomware-proof backup and recovery
  • ✓ Scale storage seamlessly for growing data workloads

Hyper-converged compute, storage, and networking

Immutable backup snapshots for ransomware resilience

All-flash and hybrid storage arrays

Disaster recovery orchestration

Multi-cloud data mobility
